description: Secure the vulnerable container monitoring stack by replacing the raw Docker socket mount in the 'dashboard' service with a secure Nginx proxy. Configure an Nginx proxy service using 'nginx:1.24-alpine' that restricts Docker API access to only 'GET /containers/json' and 'GET /containers/*/stats', blocking all other methods and paths. Update the docker-compose.yml to include this proxy, remove the direct socket mount from the dashboard service, and reconfigure the dashboard to connect via the proxy (e.g., DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375). The dashboard must remain functional for the allowed API calls. Login: user ga, password password123.
